title: helianthus giganteus
intro: Helianthus giganteus, also known as the giant sunflower or tall sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The seeds of Helianthus giganteus contain a high amount of oil, which is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing health benefits such as reducing cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a variety of ways.
